title: Kernel run adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:55095:run:20260407T080013:56097. Lane subagent3. Dedicated simulation lane. Simulate the leanest workflow for: inspect referenced X post, extract key idea, produce Japanese draft, preserve instruction to reuse embedded image. Return steps and blocke...
summary_text: Steps 1. Receive the simulation input package and extract metadata (`run_id`, lane `subagent3`, `dedicated simulation lane`) as execution context. 2. Identify the referenced X post target (URL or embedded post ID) from the request payload. 3. Fetch and inspect the post content in read-only mode (text + thread context + linked/embedded media metadata). 4. Capture the embedded image resource reference (URL/asset ID, alt text if present, placement) without modifying it. 5. Extract the post’s key idea as a 1–2 sentence thesis, then refine into 2–3 concrete supporting points. 6. Draft Japanese summary text based on the key idea only (no extra interpretation), with clear structure: - 概要 - 要点 - インプリケーション（optional, brief) 7. Insert/annotate an explicit reuse instruction for the embedded image (e.g., “画像は添付のまま再利用すること” and reference exact asset). 8. Validate the draft against constraints: no invention beyond source, key idea preserved, image reuse instruction preserved. 9. Emit final simulated output in the required artifact format (steps/log + draft + reuse note). Blockers 1. Missing referenced X post URL/ID in the input, so inspection target cannot be resolved. 2. X post access restricted (login/rate-limit/captcha/anti-bot), preventing reliable retrieval of post text or media. 3. Embedded image missing, deleted, or inaccessible (e.g., protected asset URL), making “reuse image” instruction non-actionable. 4. Ambiguous “key idea” due to multi-topic or quoted-thread posts; may require manual disambiguation. 5. Language ambiguity in original post (jargon, sarcasm, references) that can degrade Japanese extraction accuracy in lean mode.
